description: Brand contract for the Shop three-step information/shipping/billing starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on information, shipping, billing, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Billing and upsell surfaces use SDK cart/order displays; shipping prices come from window.next.getShippingMethods(), not static Olympus-style shipping_methods frontmatter.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: No checkout bundle picker; the family uses a multi-step shop flow with dynamic shipping before billing.
family_inventory.order_bump: No promoted order-bump contract yet; unsupported bump widgets must be removed unless the family contract is promoted.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Shop three-step upsells currently include inline refs plus upsell_offer/upsell_bundle_tiers mapping hints; both must be replaced from CampaignSpec/API.

exit_pop.behavior: No promoted exit-pop include in the three-step family; any copied exit widget must be stripped unless CampaignSpec maps an offer/code.
